stages.concept:
# Unit 123: 주격 관계대명사 who, which - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **주격 관계대명사 who, which**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> I have a friend **who** lives in New York.
> 나는 뉴욕에 사는 친구가 있다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 관계대명사는 두 문장을 **하나로 연결**해주어요. **주격 관계대명사**는 관계절에서 **주어** 역할을 해요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **who** — 선행사가 **사람**일 때

> The girl **who** is singing is my sister.
> 노래하고 있는 소녀는 나의 언니이다.

> I met a man **who** speaks five languages.
> 나는 다섯 가지 언어를 말하는 남자를 만났다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **which** — 선행사가 **사물/동물**일 때

> I read a book **which** was very interesting.
> 나는 매우 재미있는 책을 읽었다.

> The dog **which** is running is mine.
> 뛰고 있는 개는 나의 것이다.

**Q. 다음 빈칸에 알맞은 관계대명사를 고르세요.**
"This is the bus (       ) goes to the airport."
1. who
2. which ✅
3. whom

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요. 앞의 선행사 'the bus'가 사물이므로 관계대명사는 which를 써야 해요. 또한 뒤에 동사(goes)가 바로 오는 것으로 보아 주어 역할을 하는 주격 관계대명사 자리예요!

👩‍🏫 선생님: **that** — 사람/사물 **모두** 가능

> The boy **that** is reading a book is Tom.
> 책을 읽고 있는 소년은 Tom이다.

> The car **that** is parked there is mine.
> 거기에 주차된 차는 나의 것이다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 사람 → who, 사물 → which, 둘 다 → that! 관계절에서 주어 역할이군요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 123: 주격 관계대명사 who, which - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I saw a man (     ) was playing the guitar in the park.
> **정답** who

---

**02.** She has a dog ? is very friendly.
> **정답** which

---

**03.** The boy ? sits next to me is my friend.
> **정답** who

---

**04.** I read a book ? was very interesting.
> **정답** which

---

**05.** The girl ? won the contest is my classmate.
> **정답** who

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I met a man which is a doctor.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** which → who

---

**07.** She has a cat who is very cute.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** who → which

---

**08.** The boy which studies hard is my friend.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** which → who

---

**09.** I found a bag who was under the desk.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** who → which

---

**10.** The girl which sings well is popular.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** which → who

---

**11.** 두 문장을 관계대명사를 사용하여 한 문장으로 만드시오.
I have a friend. She lives in Busan.
> **정답** I have a friend who lives in Busan.

---

**12.** She bought a dress. It was very pretty.
> **정답** She bought a dress which was very pretty.

---

**13.** The man is kind. He teaches us English.
> **정답** The man who teaches us English is kind.

---

**14.** I ate a cake. It was delicious.
> **정답** I ate a cake which was delicious.

---

**15.** The girl is my sister. She is wearing a blue hat.
> **정답** The girl who is wearing a blue hat is my sister.

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
나는 서울에 사는 친구가 있다.
have I a friend who lives in Seoul
> **정답** I / have / a / friend / who / lives / in / Seoul

---

**17.** 그녀는 재미있는 책을 읽었다.
She a read book which was interesting
> **정답** She / read / a / book / which / was / interesting

---

**18.** 영어를 가르치는 선생님은 친절하다.
The teacher who teaches English kind is
> **정답** The / teacher / who / teaches / English / is / kind

---

**19.** 나는 맛있는 케이크를 먹었다.
ate I a cake which was delicious
> **정답** I / ate / a / cake / which / was / delicious

---

**20.** 노래를 잘하는 소녀는 인기가 있다.
The girl who well sings is popular
> **정답** The / girl / who / sings / well / is / popular
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 123: 주격 관계대명사 who, which - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
I met a girl _______________ told me how to go to the
museum.
This is the boy ___________ broke the window.
who
which
whom
what
> **정답** who

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
I didn't believe his opinion ______________ turned
out to be true.
I love the puppy ___________ is sleeping in the
kitchen.
who
whom
which
what
> **정답** which

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
I went to see Ms. Brown __________________ teaches
me English.
We talked about the speech contest
_______________ will be held next week.
who - whom
which - who
who- which
whom - which
> **정답** who- which

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
On the floor, Tom found a cell phone
_______________ had no name.
He passed it to the police officer _____________ will
find its owner.
which - who
which - whom
that - which
who - that
> **정답** which - who

---

**05.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Amy decided to find a job who pays her
well.
Tom didn't enjoy the movie which was
difficult to understand.
Amy bought a book which had a thick hard
cover.
Tom met a client who asked him for help.
> **정답** Amy decided to find a job who pays her well.

---

**06.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Tom kicked the ball which was on the
ground.
I usually like a man who smiles a lot.
Amy visited the new restaurant which sells
Italian food.
A noise is coming from the children who is
running and shouting.
> **정답** A noise is coming from the children who is running
and shouting.

---

**07.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 길에서 우연히 Tom의 아빠인 Mr. Kim을 만났다.
I accidentally met Mr. Kim who is Tom's
father on the street.
I accidentally met Mr. Kim whom is Tom's
father on the street.
I accidentally met Mr. Kim what was Tom's
father on the street.
I accidentally met Mr. Kim which is Tom's
father on the street.
> **정답** I accidentally met Mr. Kim who is Tom's father on
the street.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Amy는 슬프게 끝난 그 영화를 좋아하지 않았다.
Amy did not like the movie it ended sadly.
Amy liked the movie which ended sadly.
Amy did not like the movie who ends sadly.
Amy did not like the movie which ended
sadly.
> **정답** Amy did not like the movie which ended sadly.

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 너무 어린 아이들을 돌보고 있다.
Tom is looking after the kids who is too
young.
Tom is looking after the kids whom are too
young.
Tom is looking after the kids who are too
young.
Tom is looking after the kids which are too
young.
> **정답** Tom is looking after the kids who are too young.

---

**10.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I am studying math which is the most difficult
subject for me.
The doctor treated the patient who suffered
from the flu.
She wants a room which have a nice view.
Tom read a book which was about Korean
history.
> **정답** She wants a room which have a nice view.

---

**11.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The girl who works at a restaurant has two
jobs.
People who comes from Japan are usually
very quiet.
The man who lives next door is very kind.
She drank the juice which was in the fridge.
> **정답** People who comes from Japan are usually very
quiet.

---

**12.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom often looks up the dictionary.
It has more than 500 vocabularies.
Tom often looks up the dictionary which
have more than 500 vocabularies.
Tom often looks up the dictionary which has
more than 500 vocabularies.
Tom often looks up the dictionary who has
more than 500 vocabularies.
Tom often looks up the dictionary it has
more than 500 vocabularies.
> **정답** Tom often looks up the dictionary which has more
than 500 vocabularies.

---

**13.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
I know well about Tom
Tom has a lot of friends.
I know well about Tom which has a lot of
friends.
I know well about Tom who have a lot of
friends.
I know well about Tom who has a lot of
friends.
I know well about Tom whom has a lot of
friends.
> **정답** I know well about Tom who has a lot of friends.

---

**14.** 다음 문장 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Anyone who are interested can apply.
I like my English teachers who has the British
accent.
Most people like stories which has happy
endings.
The vet is treating a dog which is bleeding
badly.
> **정답** The vet is treating a dog which is bleeding badly.

---

**15.** 다음 문장 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
An old lady asked me to walk her dog which
look wild and scary.
The teacher was angry with a student which
was chewing gum in the class.
The boy mopped the floor who was already
cleaned.
I am reading a book which is written by Jane
Austen.
> **정답** I am reading a book which is written by Jane Austen.

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
(관계대명사 that 제외)
We stayed at a hotel which
were in the middle of the
city.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** were → was

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
(관계대명사 that 제외)
A waiter which served at a
restaurant was polite.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** which → who

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The lawyer who earn a lot
of money is very unkind.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
• lawyer 변호사
> **정답** earn → earns

---

**19.** 다음 대화에서 어색한 부분을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오. (2개,
관계대명사 that 제외)
A: Who's that girl?
B: Which girl? Are you talking about the girl
which is wearing a red dress or a girl
who has a blouse and a
skirt?
A: I'm not talking about either one of them. Do you
see the kid who have purple hair.
B: Sure. I know her. Her name is Amy.
> **정답** who is, who has, who has

---

**20.** 다음 글에서 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오. (2개,
관계대명사 that 제외)
Tom is from Korea. When he was ten, he spent
a year in America without his parents. He stayed
with a family which lived near L.A. The
family was lovely and took good care of him. He
also had many friends who was very
kind to him and helped him learn English. He
enjoyed living and studying in L.A. He
sometimes misses them.
> **정답** spent, who lived, who were, living
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 123 주격 관계대명사 who, which중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 관계사를 사용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
(관계대명사 that 사용하지 않음)
흥미로워보이는 그녀의 취미는 향수 만들기이다.
힌트 (     ) look, interesting
Her hobby  (     )   (     )   (     )  is making perfume.
• perfume 향수
정답 which, looks, interesting

---

**02.** 관계사를 사용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
(관계대명사 that 사용하지 않음)
빨리 달리는 누구든지 경기에 참여할 수 있다.
힌트 (     ) run, fast
Anyone  (     )   (     )   (     )  can participate in the
game.
정답 who, runs, fast

---

**03.** 관계사를 사용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
(관계대명사 that 사용하지 않음)
Vivian은 나를 도와주었던 사람이었다.
힌트 (     ) help
Vivian was the person  (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 who, helped, me

---

**04.** 어법상 어색한 부분을 모두 찾아 다시 쓰시오. (관계대명사
that 사용하지 않음)
The park who are in New York is Central Park.
The park  (     )  in New York is Central
Park.
정답 which is

---

**05.** 어법상 어색한 부분을 모두 찾아 다시 쓰시오. (관계대명사
that 사용하지 않음)
The waiter who didn't work hard were fired
yesterday.
The waiter who didn't work hard 
yesterday.
정답 was fired

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
그녀는 넓은 책꽂이가 있는 책상을 구입했다.
힌트 (     ) bookshelf, a, which, had, wide
She bought a desk  (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 which, had, a, wide, bookshelf

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
Tom은 그의 집에서 멀리 사는 그의 조부모님을 방문했다.
힌트 (     ) who, house, far, lived, from, his
Tom visited his grandparents  (     )   (     )  
  (     )   (     ) .
정답 who, lived, far, from, his, house

---

**08.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 대화문을 완성하시오.
my, cousin, who/which, came
A: Who is that girl?
B: She is  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  from England
yesterday.
정답 my, cousin, who, came

---

**09.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 대화문을 완성하시오. (관계대명사
that 사용하지 않음)
a girl, who/which, be
A: Did you go to the party alone?
B: No, I went there with  (     )   (     )  
 my best friend.
정답 a, girl, who, was

---

**10.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오. (관계대명사
that 사용하지 않음)
Jeff는 오래된 가구를 버렸다.
힌트 (     ) who/which, furniture, be
Jeff threw away  (     )   (     )   (     )  old.
정답 furniture, which, was

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 123: 주격 관계대명사 who, which - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
I met a boy _______________ showed me how to get to the library.
This is the girl ___________ won the prize. who which whom what
> 정답: who

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
I didn't believe the story ______________ turned out to be true.
I love the kitten ___________ is sleeping on the sofa. who whom which what
> 정답: which

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
I went to see Mr. Park __________________ teaches me science.
We talked about the talent show _______________ will be held next month. who - whom which - who who- which whom - which
> 정답: who- which

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
On the bench, Tom found a wallet _______________ had no ID card.
He gave it to the security guard _____________ will find its owner. which - who which - whom that - which who - that
> 정답: which - who

---

**05.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Amy decided to find a hobby who keeps her busy.
Tom didn't enjoy the play which was hard to follow.
Kevin bought a backpack which had many pockets.
Sarah met a neighbor who asked her for directions.
> 정답: Amy decided to find a hobby who keeps her busy.

---

**06.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Tom kicked the ball which was on the field.
I usually like a person who listens well.
Amy visited the new café which sells fresh juice.
A sound is coming from the boys who is laughing loudly.
> 정답: A sound is coming from the boys who is laughing

---

**07.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 거리에서 우연히 Tom의 엄마인 Smith 씨를 만났다.
I accidentally met Ms. Smith who is Tom's mother on the street.
I accidentally met Ms. Smith whom is Tom's mother on the street.
I accidentally met Ms. Smith what was Tom's mother on the street.
I accidentally met Ms. Smith which is Tom's mother on the street.
> 정답: I accidentally met Ms. Smith who is Tom's mother on

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 슬프게 끝난 그 소설을 좋아하지 않았다.
Tom did not like the novel it ended sadly.
Tom liked the novel which ended sadly.
Tom did not like the novel who ends sadly.
Tom did not like the novel which ended sadly.
> 정답: Tom did not like the novel which ended sadly.

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Amy는 너무 어린 동생들을 돌보고 있다.
Amy is looking after her siblings who is too young.
Amy is looking after her siblings whom are too young.
Amy is looking after her siblings who are too young.
Amy is looking after her siblings which are too young.
> 정답: Amy is looking after her siblings who are too young.

---

**10.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I am studying science which is the most interesting subject for me.
The nurse treated the patient who suffered from a cold.
He wants a house which have a big garden.
Tom read a story which was about Korean culture.
> 정답: He wants a house which have a big garden.

---

**11.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The boy who works at a store has two part-time jobs.
Students who comes from France are usually very polite.
The woman who lives upstairs is very friendly.
She drank the tea which was on the table.
